user.title: charge44 devices
user.description: Connect to your Zendure 800 Pro and Shelly 3EM Pro via local MQTT.

data_description.shelly_id: Visible as the topic prefix (e.g. shellypro3em-{id})

tibber.title: Tibber + solar forecast (optional)
tibber.description: Enter your Tibber API token for price-based charging. Pick a solar forecast sensor so cheap-charge is skipped when the sun will fill the battery anyway. Both optional — leave empty to skip.

tibber_home.title: Tibber home
tibber_home.description: Select which home to fetch prices for.

error.invalid_token: Tibber API token is invalid or no homes returned.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one charge44 instance is allowed.

init.title: charge44 options
init.description: Update Tibber token or solar forecast entity. Leave Tibber token empty to disable cheap-charge.
